title: Resolution Auhorizing the Honorable Municipal Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Sign a Deed of Donation on Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños with the Philippine Rice Research Institute (PHILRICE) Los Baños Donating Seven Hundred Thirty Four (734) Bags of Seeds. (AUTHOR: HON. CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 09/14/2020)
